title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Verify that the Custom Swipe Sensor settings in device settings match the documented specifications when connected to Osprey.
steps: Start the app with Osprey connected.
Check for the Custom Swipe Sensor tab.
Verify the settings and values match the specifications in the Custom Swipe Sensor documentation.
expected: The Custom Swipe Sensor settings and values match the specifications in the Custom Swipe Sensor documentation.
